name: Beefy Chili Mac
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup shredded Monterey jack cheese, or Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef steaks lengthwise into 1-inch wide strips.
2. Then cut the beef crosswise into 1-inch pieces.
3. Spray a Dutch oven with vegetable cooking spray and heat to medium-high until hot.
4. Add the beef and onion to the pan; cook and stir for 3 minutes.
5. Stir in the tomatoes, pasta, and 1/2 cup water.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
7. Cover tightly and simmer for 20 minutes or until the pasta is tender.
8. Sprinkle with cheese before serving.
9. Makes 4 servings.
